BatchUnsubscribeOfPrepaidInstances.instanceIds: List of instance IDs; up to 20 instances are supported per operation.
BatchUnsubscribeOfPrepaidInstances.relatedReleaseFlag: Whether to release the EIP and data disks attached to the instance at the time of release. Default: false (not released). **Note**: Prepaid CDS disks associated with the instance will be forcibly released together with the instance.
BatchUnsubscribeOfPrepaidInstances.deleteCdsSnapshotFlag: Whether to release cloud disk snapshots. Default: false (not released).
BatchUnsubscribeOfPrepaidInstances.deleteRelatedEnisFlag: Whether to delete associated ENIs when the instance is released. Default: false (not deleted).
